channel.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
channel.description: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Michael Chernus shares how playing John Wayne Gacy affected him.
item.description: Michael Chernus discusses the emotional and psychological impact of playing serial killer John Wayne Gacy, sharing insights into the role and how it affected him personally and professionally.

media:content.media:title: Michael Chernus shares how playing John Wayne Gacy affected him.
media:content.media:description: Michael Chernus discusses the emotional and psychological impact of playing serial killer John Wayne Gacy, sharing insights into the role and how it affected him personally and professionally.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Inside Darlie Routier's Deranged Mind
item.description: This video reviews the Darlie Routier case, exploring the investigation, courtroom developments, and the questions that continue to surround the story.

media:content.media:title: Inside Darlie Routier's Deranged Mind
media:content.media:description: This video reviews the Darlie Routier case, exploring the investigation, courtroom developments, and the questions that continue to surround the story.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: The Delphi Murders: Is the Real Killer Still Out There?
item.description: Explore the Delphi Murders case, reviewing the investigation, key evidence, and the ongoing questions about whether the perpetrator has been identified.

media:content.media:title: The Delphi Murders: Is the Real Killer Still Out There?
media:content.media:description: Explore the Delphi Murders case, reviewing the investigation, key evidence, and the ongoing questions about whether the perpetrator has been identified.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: 3-Year-Old Girl Left Emaciated in Roach-Infested Home
item.description: This video examines a child neglect case involving a 3-year-old girl found in severe conditions, focusing on the investigation and the legal response that followed.

media:content.media:title: 3-Year-Old Girl Left Emaciated in Roach-Infested Home
media:content.media:description: This video examines a child neglect case involving a 3-year-old girl found in severe conditions, focusing on the investigation and the legal response that followed.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: This story is truly tragic.
item.description: This video revisits a deeply tragic case, examining the events, investigation, and lasting impact on those involved.

media:content.media:title: This story is truly tragic.
media:content.media:description: This video revisits a deeply tragic case, examining the events, investigation, and lasting impact on those involved.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: What Happened to The Enoch Family?
item.description: Explore the mysterious case of the Enoch family, reviewing the events, investigation, and the unanswered questions surrounding their story.

media:content.media:title: What Happened to The Enoch Family?
media:content.media:description: Explore the mysterious case of the Enoch family, reviewing the events, investigation, and the unanswered questions surrounding their story.
